title: The Fallen: A Halo Fan Film
original_title: The Fallen: A Halo Fan Film
overview: Set during the events of Halo: Combat Evolved, a group of soldiers and survivors from the Pillar of Autumn make their way across the mysterious Halo landscape fighting for their lives against Covenant forces.
